category_sources: source_facts.description says X Window System display server; official Xorg manual describes Xorg as a full-featured X server.
display_name_sources: official Xorg manual uses Xorg - X11R7 X server; source_facts.name is xorg-server.
docs_sources: official X.Org documentation page points to current protocol docs, man pages, and development documentation; official Xorg man page documents the server.
repo_sources: official X.Org/Freedesktop documentation states X source is hosted in Freedesktop git; freedesktop cgit identifies xorg/xserver as mirrored from https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/xorg/xserver.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list Xorg, Xvfb, Xephyr, Xnest; official manual describes Xorg as an X server.
